cves.audit_signal: jenkins script-security plugin < 1.54 + Groovy sandbox enabled
cves.expected_probe: test -f /opt/apps/jenkins/plugins/script-security.hpi && unzip -p /opt/apps/jenkins/plugins/script-security.hpi META-INF/MANIFEST.MF 2>/dev/null | grep -oP 'Plugin-Version: \K[0-9.]+' | xargs -I{} echo 'Version: {}' || echo 'NOT_FOUND'

cves.audit_signal: gitlab CE/EE 16.1-16.7.1 accepts password_reset with multiple email[]
cves.expected_probe: test -f /opt/apps/gitlab/gitlab-ce_16.7.1-ce.0_amd64.deb && dpkg-deb -f /opt/apps/gitlab/gitlab-ce_16.7.1-ce.0_amd64.deb Version 2>/dev/null | grep -oP '[0-9.]+' | head -1 | xargs -I{} echo 'Version: {}' || ls /opt/apps/gitlab/gitlab-ce_*.deb 2>/dev/null | grep -oP 'gitlab-ce_\K[0-9.]+' | head -1 | xargs -I{} echo 'Version: {}'
